testcase.name: test_trajectory_glasses_data_has_description
testcase.failure: Trajectory Glasses description should mention passive behavior (Issue #1028) at line -1

testcase.name: test_trajectory_glasses_description_mentions_passive_boost
testcase.failure: Trajectory Glasses description should mention passive (Issue #1028) at line -1

testcase.name: test_enemy_gd_transition_to_searching_does_not_set_has_left_idle
testcase.failure: Issue #921: _transition_to_searching must NOT set _has_left_idle = true. Doing so makes SEARCH_MAX_DURATION timeout unreachable for patrol enemies. Regression test for the fix documented in PR #1464. at line -1

testcase.name: test_default_active_item_unlock_state
testcase.failure: Trajectory Glasses should be unlocked by default (no unlock condition) at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_unlocked_weapons
testcase.failure: M16 should be unlocked (no condition) at line -1

testcase.name: test_rifle_casing_color_brass
testcase.failure: [COLOR(0.7, 0.7, 0.7, 1)] expected to equal [COLOR(0.9, 0.8, 0.4, 1)]: Rifle casing should be brass (default) at line -1

testcase.name: test_cover_at_exactly_min_distance
testcase.failure: Cover at exactly min distance should be rejected at line -1

testcase.name: test_miss_detection_enters_reaim_phase
testcase.failure: Drone should enter re-aiming phase after the overshoot bottoms out at line -1

testcase.name: test_create_all_actions_returns_all_actions
testcase.failure: [23] expected to equal [20]: Should create 20 enemy actions at line -1

testcase.name: test_dead_enemy_does_not_react_to_explosion
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Sound propagation delivers to all listeners at line -1

testcase.name: test_confused_enemy_does_not_react_to_explosion
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Sound propagation delivers to all listeners at line -1

testcase.name: test_grenade_explosion_scenario
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Medium enemy should transition to combat at line -1

testcase.name: test_experimental_sample_is_last_item_type
testcase.failure: [21] expected to equal [18]: EXPERIMENTAL_SAMPLE should have the highest type value (18) at line -1

testcase.name: test_logging_independent_of_other_settings
testcase.failure: FOV should still be enabled (default) at line -1

testcase.name: test_duration_at_edge
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Should apply effect at line -1

testcase.name: test_no_effect_at_very_edge
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Player slightly inside radius should still be affected at line -1

testcase.name: test_weaker_effect_does_not_override
testcase.failure: [0.125] expected to equal [0.875]: Weaker flashbang should not override stronger one at line -1

testcase.name: test_create_all_actions_flashlight_action_count
testcase.failure: [23] expected to equal [22]: create_all_actions should return 22 actions (including 2 flashlight actions) at line -1

testcase.name: test_effect_scale_is_clamped_to_minimum
testcase.failure: [0.2] expected to equal [0.3]: Effect scale should be clamped to minimum 0.3 at line -1

testcase.name: test_player_has_line_of_sight_to_method_exists
testcase.failure: Manager should have _player_has_line_of_sight_to method for wall occlusion at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_player_method_exists
testcase.failure: Manager should have _get_player method at line -1

testcase.name: test_create_grenade_flash_method_exists
testcase.failure: Manager should have _create_grenade_flash method at line -1

testcase.name: test_create_grenade_light_method_exists
testcase.failure: Manager should have _create_grenade_light method at line -1

testcase.name: test_effect_ends_after_duration
testcase.failure: Should start fading out after duration at line -1

testcase.name: test_full_effect_cycle
testcase.failure: at line -1

testcase.name: test_audio_setup_on_ready
testcase.failure: Audio setup should be called on _ready() at line -1

testcase.name: test_castle_level_is_last_level
testcase.failure: ["res://scenes/levels/RevolverLevel.tscn"] expected to equal [""]: Castle is the last level, next should be empty at line -1

testcase.name: test_beach_level_is_last_in_ordering
testcase.failure: ["res://scenes/levels/DocksLevel.tscn"] expected to equal [""]: BeachLevel should be the last level (no next) at line -1

testcase.name: test_beach_level_after_castle
testcase.failure: ["res://scenes/levels/RevolverLevel.tscn"] expected to equal ["res://scenes/levels/BeachLevel.tscn"]: Next level after CastleLevel should be BeachLevel at line -1

testcase.name: test_multiple_cycles
testcase.failure: [0.0] expected to equal [4.0]: LightA should be on at the start of a new cycle after 5 complete cycles at line -1

testcase.name: test_signal_emitted_on_particles_change
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Signal should be emitted when particles setting changes at line -1

testcase.name: test_signal_emitted_on_blood_decals_change
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Signal should be emitted when blood decals setting changes at line -1

testcase.name: test_signal_emitted_on_ai_change
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Signal should be emitted when AI setting changes at line -1

testcase.name: test_multiple_changes_emit_multiple_signals
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [3]: Each setting change should emit one signal at line -1

testcase.name: test_startup_guard_lifts_when_target_scene_arrives
testcase.failure: Guard should lift and save when target scene arrives at line -1

testcase.name: test_startup_guard_allows_auto_save_after_subsequent_level_change
testcase.failure: Guard should be lifted at line -1

testcase.name: test_cannot_shoot_with_zero_ammo
testcase.failure: Ammo depleted callback should be called at line -1

testcase.name: test_ammo_changed_callback_called
testcase.failure: Ammo changed callback should be called at line -1

testcase.name: test_died_callback_called
testcase.failure: Died callback should be called at line -1

testcase.name: test_reload_completed_callback_called
testcase.failure: Reload completed callback should be called at line -1

testcase.name: test_blood_effect_callback_called
testcase.failure: Blood effect callback should be called on hit at line -1

testcase.name: test_update_predictions_decays_probability
testcase.failure: [0.24922118380062] expected to be < than [0.24922118380062]: Probability should decrease over time at line -1

testcase.name: test_update_predictions_clears_after_max_age
testcase.failure: Predictions should be cleared after max age at line -1

testcase.name: test_style_aggressive_classification
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Player moving toward enemy should be classified as AGGRESSIVE at line -1

testcase.name: test_style_cautious_classification
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [2]: Player moving away from enemy should be classified as CAUTIOUS at line -1

testcase.name: test_style_cunning_classification
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [3]: Player moving perpendicular should be classified as CUNNING at line -1

testcase.name: test_style_affects_predictions
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: at line -1

testcase.name: test_process_frame_decays_predictions
testcase.failure: [0.24922118380062] expected to be < than [0.24922118380062]: Predictions should decay during process_frame at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_name
testcase.failure: ["Drilling Bullets"] expected to equal ["Recoil Compensator"]: Recoil Compensator should have correct name at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_icon_path_contains_recoil
testcase.failure: Recoil Compensator icon path should contain 'recoil_compensator' at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_description_mentions_15_seconds
testcase.failure: Recoil Compensator description should mention 15 second charge (Issue #1073) at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_description_mentions_recoil
testcase.failure: Recoil Compensator description should mention recoil suppression at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_description_mentions_fire_rate_boost
testcase.failure: Recoil Compensator description should mention 10% fire rate boost (Issue #1073) at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_has_activation_hint
testcase.failure: Recoil Compensator should have an activation_hint key at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_active_item_name_recoil_compensator
testcase.failure: ["Drilling Bullets"] expected to equal ["Recoil Compensator"]: get_active_item_name(14) should return 'Recoil Compensator' at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_all_active_item_types_count_is_15
testcase.failure: [16] expected to equal [15]: There should be 15 active item types (0-14) including RECOIL_COMPENSATOR at line -1

testcase.name: test_has_recoil_compensator_after_selection
testcase.failure: has_recoil_compensator() should return true after selecting it at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_does_not_conflict_with_flashlight
testcase.failure: Recoil compensator should be active at line -1

testcase.name: test_recoil_compensator_does_not_conflict_with_force_field
testcase.failure: Recoil compensator should be active at line -1

testcase.name: test_start_playback_emits_replay_started_signal
testcase.failure: start_playback() should emit replay_started signal at line -1

testcase.name: test_stop_playback_emits_replay_ended_signal
testcase.failure: stop_playback() should emit replay_ended signal at line -1

testcase.name: test_stop_playback_works_during_playback_ending
testcase.failure: stop_playback() should work when _playback_ending is true at line -1

testcase.name: test_playback_emits_progress_signal
testcase.failure: [-1.00000000000000000000] expected to equal [0.1] +/- [0.001]: Progress signal should report current playback time at line -1

testcase.name: test_playback_ending_timer_triggers_stop
testcase.failure: replay_ended signal should be emitted after end timer expires at line -1

testcase.name: test_playback_update_with_empty_frames_stops
testcase.failure: Should emit replay_ended when stopping due to empty frames at line -1

testcase.name: test_physics_process_resolves_ending_state
testcase.failure: replay_ended should be emitted when ending state resolves at line -1

testcase.name: test_dead_enemy_has_gray_color
testcase.failure: [0.30000001192093] expected to equal [0.3]: Dead enemy should have gray color (r=0.3) at line -1

testcase.name: test_shot_cancelled_if_ammo_gone_during_delay
testcase.failure: Shot should be cancelled if no ammo at line -1

testcase.name: test_can_fire_again_after_shot_completes
testcase.failure: Should be able to fire again at line -1

testcase.name: test_multiple_shots_sequence
testcase.failure: [1] expected to equal [2]: Should have fired 2 shots at line -1

testcase.name: test_multiple_manual_cock_shots
testcase.failure: [2] expected to equal [3]: Uncocked fire rotated to slot 3 at line -1

testcase.name: test_rotation_sequence_uncocked_fire
testcase.failure: [4] expected to equal [0]: Second fire should wrap to slot 0 at line -1

testcase.name: test_cocked_vs_uncocked_rotation_difference
testcase.failure: [1] expected to equal [2]: Uncocked fire: rotated to slot 2 at line -1

testcase.name: test_callback_on_cartridge_insert
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Callback should report 1 cartridge loaded at line -1

testcase.name: test_callback_on_casings_ejected
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [4]: Callback should report 4 casings ejected at line -1

testcase.name: test_displaced_active_item_returned_to_pedestal
testcase.failure: [""] expected to equal ["Flashlight"]: Pedestal label should show displaced item name at line -1

testcase.name: test_item_label_active_item
testcase.failure: [""] expected to equal ["Flashlight"]: Active item label should match ActiveItemManager name at line -1

testcase.name: test_item_label_none_returns_none_name
testcase.failure: [""] expected to equal ["None"]: Type 0 (NONE) label should be 'None' at line -1

testcase.name: test_perfect_run_scenario
testcase.failure: ["A+"] expected to equal ["S"]: Perfect run should get S rank at line -1

testcase.name: test_calculate_recovery_time_clamped_spread_ratio
testcase.failure: Should clamp spread ratio to [0, 1] at line -1

testcase.name: test_buffer_not_set_during_reload
testcase.failure: Should not fire without a new click after reload (Issue #821) at line -1

testcase.name: test_sniper_bullet_scene_has_trail_node
testcase.failure: [0] expected to be > than [0]: SniperBulletEnemy.TrailLength must be > 0 to show tracer (Issue #1171) at line -1

testcase.name: test_sniper_bullet_trail_length_is_positive
testcase.failure: [0] expected to be > than [0]: SniperBulletEnemy.TrailLength should be > 0 so tracer renders (Issue #1171 fix) at line -1

testcase.name: test_emit_sound_respects_min_intensity_threshold
testcase.failure: [1] expected to equal [0]: Listener should not receive very low intensity sound at line -1

testcase.name: test_yield_expires_after_max_time
testcase.failure: is_yielding should be false after timeout at line -1

testcase.name: test_yield_continues_before_max_time
testcase.failure: Should still yield before YIELD_MAX_WAIT_TIME at line -1

testcase.name: test_cooldown_decrements_with_delta
testcase.failure: [0.3] expected to be < than [0.3]: Cooldown timer should decrement when check_and_yield is called at line -1

testcase.name: test_set_active_item_to_teleport_bracers
testcase.failure: [3] expected to equal [2]: Active item type should change to TELEPORT_BRACERS at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_active_item_name_teleport_bracers
testcase.failure: ["Homing Bullets"] expected to equal ["Teleport Bracers"]: at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_active_item_description_teleport_bracers
testcase.failure: Teleport Bracers description should mention teleport at line -1

testcase.name: test_get_active_item_icon_path_teleport_bracers
testcase.failure: Teleport Bracers icon path should contain 'teleport_bracers' at line -1

testcase.name: test_switch_between_all_active_items
testcase.failure: [3] expected to equal [2]: at line -1

testcase.name: test_position_outside_right_wall_clamped
testcase.failure: Position outside right wall should be clamped to navigation mesh at line -1

testcase.name: test_position_outside_bottom_wall_clamped
testcase.failure: Position outside bottom wall should be clamped to navigation mesh at line -1

testcase.name: test_trajectory_ray_single_blink_triggered_at_25_percent
testcase.failure: Ray should be off during first half of single-blink at 25% threshold at line -1

testcase.name: test_continuous_blink_ray_is_off_during_first_half_period
testcase.failure: Ray should be off during first half of blink period in continuous phase at line -1

testcase.name: test_reload_after_early_grenade_completes_tutorial
testcase.failure: Tutorial should complete when reload done after early grenade throw at line -1

testcase.name: test_grenade_hint_not_shown_without_grenades
testcase.failure: Tutorial auto-completes when no grenades available (Fix 3rd#9) at line -1

testcase.name: test_mark_weapon_seen_emits_signal
testcase.failure: [""] expected to equal ["rifle"]: weapon_seen signal should emit with weapon_id at line -1

testcase.name: test_reset_weapons_seen_emits_settings_changed
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: reset_weapons_seen should emit settings_changed signal at line -1

testcase.name: test_died_signal_emitted_on_death
testcase.failure: Died signal should be emitted when enemy dies at line -1

testcase.name: test_died_signal_only_emitted_once
testcase.failure: [0] expected to equal [1]: Died signal should only be emitted once at line -1
